contract.dressing: SIGN-IN: dark wood-plank wall with 'ANTLER' in white capitals; white AITX pull-up banner ('Building AI's future in Texas', QR, twilight skyline); white check-in desk with orange flowers, orange lanyards + 'aitx Guest' name tags, sticker bowl, laptop; glass entrance doors + green EXIT; AITX A-frame ('AI that works'). ALCOVE: ANTLER + AITX step-and-repeat (coral-red ANTLER on white); NVIDIA-logo monitor; brown tan-leather loveseat (fireside-chat speaking spot); rows of black event chairs + white folding chairs; concrete kitchen/bar counter; papel-picado banners overhead; warm-wood + polished-concrete floors; exposed industrial ceiling. The ANTLER wall is BEHIND the check-in greeter (not visible in the greeter POV).

prose.lore: Antler VC's Austin venue, the home base for AITX events (monthly meetups, the NVIDIA hackathon). Two named zones: the SIGN-IN area and the SPEAKING ALCOVE.
prose.rules: Unlocked: has empty-plate references (6 angles across the two zones) and a dressing spec, but no formal turnaround/blueprint/blocking/map yet, so the resolver still refuses a full spread render here until those are locked. Comic-book register, matching the character art.
